ILLAOI_STRIKE.title: Strike
ILLAOI_DEFEND.title: Defend
SOUL_TRIAL.title: Test of Spirit
SOUL_TRIAL.description: Pull out the enemy's [gold]Soul[/gold] for {Turns:diff()} turns.
TEMPLE_IDOL.title: Raise Idol
TEMPLE_IDOL.description:
Gain {TemporaryDexterity:diff()} temporary Dexterity.
Gain {Block:diff()} Block {Times:diff()} times.
BUHRU_FOOTWORK.title: Tide-Treader
SERMON_OF_MOTION.title: Sermon of Momentum
LOW_SWEEP.title: Low Sweep
GUARDED_ADVANCE.title: Braced Advance
GUARDED_ADVANCE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Times:diff()} times.
Gain {Block:diff()} Block {Times:diff()} times.
TIDAL_SLASH.title: Tidecut
RESTLESS_CURRENT.title: Restless Current
RESTLESS_CURRENT.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}, then discard {Discard:diff()} {Discard:plural:card|cards}.
When you discard an Attack, gain {TemporaryStrength:diff()} temporary Strength.
When you discard a Skill, gain {TemporaryDexterity:diff()} temporary Dexterity.
WATCHFUL_IDOL.title: Vigil Idol
WATCHFUL_IDOL.description: The first time you gain temporary Dexterity each turn, gain {Block:diff()} Block.
SPIRIT_MARK.title: Soulbrand
SPIRIT_MARK.description:
Apply {Husk:diff()} [gold]Husk[/gold] to all non-[gold]Soul[/gold] enemies.
All [gold]Souls[/gold] last {SoulTurns:diff()} more turns and gain {Husk:diff()} [gold]Husk[/gold].
GRASPING_LESSON.title: Admonish
CONSECRATED_GROUND.title: Consecrated Ground
CONSECRATED_GROUND.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
For each Tentacle, gain {BonusBlock:diff()} additional Block.
HARSH_SERMON.title: Soul Judgment
HARSH_SERMON.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Consume all [gold]Husk[/gold] on the target.
For each [blue]1[/blue] consumed, deal {BonusDamage:diff()} additional damage.
FOLLOW_MY_VOICE.title: Heed the Call
FOLLOW_MY_VOICE.description:
[gold]Command[/gold].
If the target has [gold]Husk[/gold], [gold]Command[/gold] {BonusCommands:diff()} additional time.
BUHRU_MEDITATION.title: Buhru Trance
CRUSHING_WAVE.title: Crushing Wave
CRUSHING_WAVE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and [gold]Command[/gold].
If the target has [gold]Husk[/gold], [gold]Command[/gold] again.
TENTACLE_SLAM.title: Tentacle Slam
PRIESTESS_GUARD.title: Priestess Ward
PRIESTESS_GUARD.description:
Gain {TemporaryStrength:diff()} temporary Strength.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {WeakPower:diff()} Weak.
IDOL_RECALL.title: Idol Echo
TRIAL_DANCE.title: Dance of Trial
TRIAL_DANCE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Times:diff()} times.
If the target has [gold]Husk[/gold], draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
GUARD_BREAKING_WAVE.title: Armor-Splitting Tide
GUARD_BREAKING_WAVE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Times:diff()} times.
After each hit, apply {Husk:diff()} [gold]Husk[/gold].
SURGING_SERMON.title: Surging Homily
SURGING_SERMON.description: Gain {TemporaryStrength:diff()} temporary Strength and {TemporaryDexterity:diff()} temporary Dexterity.
LINE_BREAKER.title: Linebreaker
DEEP_MEDITATION.title: Abyssal Trance
DEEP_MEDITATION.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block {Times:diff()} times.
Next turn, gain {Faith:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold].
RHYTHM_OF_MOTION.title: Tide Rhythm
RHYTHM_OF_MOTION.description: The first time you play a Skill each turn, gain {TemporaryDexterity:diff()} temporary Dexterity.
FERVOR_OF_MOTION.title: Tide Fervor
FERVOR_OF_MOTION.description: The first time you play an Attack each turn, gain {TemporaryStrength:diff()} temporary Strength.
WOUNDED_VESSEL.title: Cracked Vessel
WOUNDED_VESSEL.description:
Pull out the enemy's [gold]Soul[/gold] for {Turns:diff()} turns.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} Weak to the body.
IDOL_WARD.title: Idol Shelter
VESSEL_CRACK.title: Crack the Vessel
VESSEL_CRACK.description:
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} Vulnerable.
If the target is a [gold]Soul[/gold], its body also gains {VulnerablePower:diff()} Vulnerable.
SPIRIT_LASH.title: Soul Lash
SPIRIT_LASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the target has [gold]Husk[/gold], [gold]Command[/gold].
MOTION_OF_NAGAKABOUROS.title: Tide of Nagakabouros
OVERSTEPPING_FAITH.title: Overstepping Faith
OVERSTEPPING_FAITH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
For each enemy, [gold]Grow[/gold] {Tentacles:diff()}.
SPIRITUAL_PREPARATION.title: Soul Rite
SPIRITUAL_PREPARATION.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block {Times:diff()} times.
If there is a [gold]Soul[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()} next turn and draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
PROPHET_OF_NAGAKABOUROS.title: Deep Oracle
LEAP_OF_FAITH.title: Faith's Retort
TIDECALLER.title: Tide Herald
TIDECALLER.description: The first time you [gold]Command[/gold] each turn, draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
DRAIN.title: Drain
DRAIN.description: Whenever a [gold]Tentacle[/gold] attacks a unit with [gold]Husk[/gold], gain {Block:diff()} Block.
RELENTLESS_FAITH.title: Unyielding Faith
RELENTLESS_FAITH.description: The first time each turn you play a targeted Attack, [gold]Command[/gold].
KRAKEN_PRIESTESS.title: Deep Priestess
KRAKEN_PRIESTESS.description: Whenever you [gold]Grow[/gold], gain {Faith:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold] for each Tentacle grown.
HARROWING_SERMON.title: Harrowing Rebuke
HARROWING_SERMON.description:
Pull out the enemy's [gold]Soul[/gold] for {Turns:diff()} turns.
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} Vulnerable to the [gold]Soul[/gold].
NAGAKABOUROS_RISING.title: God-Tide Rising
NAGAKABOUROS_RISING.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
[gold]Command[/gold] against all enemies with [gold]Husk[/gold].
ANCIENT_GOD_PROPHET.title: Ancient God Prophet
ANCIENT_GOD_PROPHET.description:
When played, [gold]Grow[/gold] {Tentacles:diff()}.
Afterward, the first time you [gold]Command[/gold] each turn, gain {Faith:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold].
SOUL_IMPACT.title: Soulquake
SOUL_IMPACT.description:
Whenever you shatter a monster's [gold]Soul[/gold], stun its body.
If the body is already stunned, apply [blue]2[/blue] Weak and [blue]2[/blue] Vulnerable to it.
TRIAL_BY_MOTION.title: Trial by Tide
SERPENT_DANCE.title: Serpent Dance
UNDERTOW.title: Undertow
UNDERTOW.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies {Times:diff()} times.
VOICE_OF_THE_DEEP.title: Voice of the Deep
VOICE_OF_THE_DEEP.description:
[gold]Command[/gold] {Commands:diff()} times.
If the target has [gold]Husk[/gold], gain {Faith:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold].
THE_SEA_ANSWERS.title: The Sea Replies
THE_SEA_ANSWERS.description:
Gain {Faith:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold].
Whenever you shatter a monster's [gold]Soul[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
DIVINE_FORM.title: Divine Form
DIVINE_FORM.description: At the start of your turn, gain {Faith:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold] and [gold]Grow[/gold] {Tentacles:diff()}.
RAGING_TIDE.title: Raging Tide
REND_SOUL.title: Rend Soul
REND_SOUL.description: Pull out [blue]X[/blue] [gold]Souls[/gold] from the enemy for {Turns:diff()} turns.
REND_SOUL.upgradedDescription: Pull out [blue]X[/blue]+{BonusSouls:diff()} [gold]Souls[/gold] from the enemy for {Turns:diff()} turns.
TRIAL_OF_THE_ANCIENT_GOD.title: Rebuke
TRIAL_OF_THE_ANCIENT_GOD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Command[/gold].
If the target is a [gold]Soul[/gold], also [gold]Command[/gold] against its body.
NAGAKABOUROS_DESCENDS.title: Nagakabouros Descends
NAGAKABOUROS_DESCENDS.description:
[gold]Grow[/gold] {Tentacles:diff()}.
The first time each turn you pull out a [gold]Soul[/gold], [gold]Command[/gold] against that Soul.
